content.Text:
Cron job config sudah diupdate tadi:
- вң… Delivery mode: `telegram` (chatId: 5383236811)  
- вң… Model: `gemini-3.1-pro-preview`

Tapi gateway belum di-restart. Coba jalanin ini di terminal kamu:

```bash
pkill -f openclaw-gateway && sleep 2 && openclaw gateway start
```

Atau dari dashboard: http://127.0.0.1:18789/ вҶ’ Restart button

Thinking.text: The user says "uwes bro" which means "already done" in Javanese slang. So they've restarted the gateway. Let me check if the cron job is working now.

content.Text: Mantap! Cek status cron job:

ToolUse.name: Check cron tasks

I can see that:
1. The old cron jobs with `qwen/qwen3.6-plus-preview:free` FAILED (the last one shows `404 No endpoints found`)
2. But there are NEW cron tasks that show `succeeded` with `kembukbot-qa-polling`!This means the cron job is working now with the new model! The cron is running and succeeding. Let me verify by checking the most recent cron tasks.

Model baru `gemini-3.1-pro-preview` WORKING!

Cek Telegram - seharusnya tiap 3 menit ada update dari Kembukbot.

The config was updated but has some issues. Let me fix it:1. `enabled` is `false` - need to set to `true`

input.command: cat ~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json | grep -E "(enabled|model|name)" && echo "---" && openclaw tasks list 2>&1 | grep -E "kembukbot" | head -5

content.Text: gaweke toombol ning telegram iki gawe enable lan disable iki , aku pingin ndue panel mini apps gwe jalanke lan manage workflow yang ada , tolong buat secara lengkap , berikan PRD mu dulu

Thinking.text:
The user wants me to create a mini apps panel in Telegram that can enable/disable the cron job. They want a complete PRD first before implementation.

Let me think about this:

1. The user wants a Telegram Mini App / Inline Keyboard that can:
   - Enable/disable the cron job
   - Manage workflow (Kembukbot QA polling, Ndrogrok tasks, etc.)
   - Have a mini dashboard

2. This requires:
   - Telegram Bot API with Inline Keyboard / Keyboard buttons
   - Or Telegram Mini App (Web App)
   - Backend handler for bot commands

Let me create a comprehensive PRD for this feature.

content.Text:
Oke, PRD lengkap dulu:

---

# PRD: Telegram Workflow Management Panel

## 1. Concept & Vision

**Mini Apps Telegram** untuk manage multi-agent workflow Kembuk Finance. Owner (Faisal) bisa:
- Enable/Disable cron jobs
- Monitor status agents
- Trigger manual sync
- Lihat log/error terbaru

**Feel:** Simple, clean, dark theme konsisten sama app.

---

## 2. Design Language

### Color Palette
```
Primary:     #3B82F6 (Blue)
Success:     #22C55E (Green)
Error:       #EF4444 (Red)
Warning:     #F59E0B (Yellow)
Background:  #1F2937 (Dark Gray)
Text:        #FFFFFF (White)
Muted:       #9CA3AF (Gray)
```

### Typography
```
Title:     Bold 16px
Body:      Regular 14px
Caption:   Regular 12px
Monospace: Code/Status 12px
```

### UI Components
```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ рҹ”§ KEMBUK WORKFLOW PANEL       в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ рҹӨ– Agents                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ Ndrogrok    [рҹҹў Active]    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в””в”Җ Kembukbot   [рҹҹў Active]    в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ вҸ° Cron Jobs                   в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ QA Polling   [рҹҹў ON ] [рҹ”„] в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в””в”Җ Sync         [рҹ”ҙ OFF] [рҹ”„] в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ рҹ“Ҡ Stats Today                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ Commits: 12                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в”ңв”Җ Deploys: 3                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ в””в”Җ Errors: 0                    в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ [рҹ”„ Sync All] [вҡҷпёҸ Settings]    в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

---

## 3. Features

### A. Main Dashboard (via Inline Keyboard)
```
/panel - Buka dashboard
```

### B. Agent Control
```
/agents - List semua agent
/agent <name> <on|off> - Toggle agent

Agent: Ndrogrok
Status: рҹҹў Active
Last Run: 2 min ago
Tasks: 5 completed

[вҸёпёҸ Pause] [рҹ”„ Restart] [рҹ“Ӣ History]
```

### C. Cron Job Control
```
/cron - List cron jobs
/cron <id> <on|off> - Toggle cron

Cron Jobs:
1. kembukbot-qa-polling
   Schedule: */3 * * * * (every 3 min)
   Status: рҹҹў ENABLED
   Last: 1 min ago
   
2. daily-backup
   Schedule: 0 0 * * * (daily midnight)
   Status: рҹ”ҙ DISABLED
   Last: Never

[рҹ”„ Toggle] [рҹ“Ӣ Logs] [вҸ° Edit]
```

### D. Manual Actions
```
/sync - Force sync semua agents
/logs [n] - Show last n log entries
/stats - Show today's statistics
/health - Check system health
```

---

## 4. Bot Commands

| Command | Access | Description |
|---------|--------|-------------|
| `/start` | All | Welcome message + menu |
| `/panel` | Owner | Open workflow dashboard |
| `/agents` | Owner | List agents status |
| `/cron` | Owner | List cron jobs |
| `/cron <id> on/off` | Owner | Toggle cron |
| `/sync` | Owner | Force sync |
| `/logs [count]` | Owner | Show logs |
| `/stats` | Owner | Show stats |
| `/health` | Owner | System health |
| `/help` | All | Help message |

---

## 5. Technical Implementation

### Bot Setup
```javascript
// /api/telegram/webhook.js (Next.js API route)
const TelegramBot = require('node-telegram-bot-api');

const bot = new TelegramBot(process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN, { polling: true });

// Owner chat ID - only accept commands from here
const OWNER_ID = '5383236811';

// Inline Keyboard Layout
const mainMenu = {
  reply_markup: {
    inline_keyboard: [
      [{ text: 'рҹӨ– Agents', callback_data: 'agents' }],
      [{ text: 'вҸ° Cron Jobs', callback_data: 'cron' }],
      [{ text: 'рҹ“Ҡ Stats', callback_data: 'stats' }],
      [{ text: 'рҹ”„ Force Sync', callback_data: 'sync' }]
    ]
  }
};

// Cron job toggle keyboard
const cronToggle = (cronId, isEnabled) => ({
  reply_markup: {
    inline_keyboard: [
      [
        { text: isEnabled ? 'рҹ”ҙ Disable' : 'рҹҹў Enable', 
          callback_data: `cron_toggle_${cronId}` }
      ],
      [{ text: 'рҹ“Ӣ Logs', callback_data: `cron_logs_${cronId}` }],
      [{ text: 'в—ҖпёҸ Back', callback_data: 'cron' }]
    ]
  }
});
```

### Cron Job Management
```javascript
// Modify ~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json via bot
const updateCronJob = async (jobId, enabled) => {
  const jobs = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(cronPath, 'utf8'));
  const job = jobs.jobs.find(j => j.id === jobId);
  if (job) {
    job.enabled = enabled;
    job.updatedAtMs = Date.now();
    fs.writeFileSync(cronPath, JSON.stringify(jobs, null, 2));
    return true;
  }
  return false;
};
```

### Message Templates
```javascript
const formatStatus = (agents) => {
  return `вҡЎ *Agent Status*

${agents.map(a => `вҖў ${a.name}: ${a.online ? 'рҹҹў Online' : 'рҹ”ҙ Offline'}`).join('\n')}

_Last updated: ${new Date().toISOString()}_`;
};

const formatCronList = (jobs) => {
  return `вҸ° *Cron Jobs*

${jobs.map((j, i) => 
  `${i+1}. ${j.name}\n` +
  `   Schedule: ${j.schedule.expr}\n` +
  `   Status: ${j.enabled ? 'рҹҹў ENABLED' : 'рҹ”ҙ DISABLED'}`
).join('\n\n')}`;
};
```

## 7. Security

- **Owner-only access**: Only chat ID `5383236811` bisa akses control panel
- **Command validation**: Semua command divalidasi
- **Rate limiting**: Max 1 command per 5 detik
- **Audit log**: Semua action di-log

---

| 1 | Basic bot with `/start`, `/help` | High |

| 3 | `/cron` list & toggle | High |
| 4 | `/agents` status | Medium |
| 5 | `/sync` manual trigger | Medium |
| 6 | `/logs` view | Low |
